prompt: A cinematic, photorealistic portrait of {argument name="main subject" default="Sam Altman"} on a gritty rooftop at dusk, wearing a black bomber jacket with an {argument name="company logo" default="OpenAI"} logo. He is flanked by exactly 4 cats in superhero costumes: a tabby Spider-Man, a black Batman, an orange Iron Man with a glowing reactor, and a tabby Captain America with a shield. The background shows a {argument name="city skyline" default="1996 New York City skyline featuring the Twin Towers"}. A whiteboard reads "MISSION: {argument name="whiteboard mission" default="MAKE INTELLIGENCE BENEFIT ALL."}" and lists exactly 4 checked items: "BETTER MODELS", "SAFE DEPLOYMENT", "REAL-WORLD IMPACT", and "SAVE SOME TREATS". A foreground wooden desk holds a retro 1990s laptop with the company logo, a mug reading "BUILD THE FUTURE TOGETHER", a walkie-talkie, and a WIRED magazine titled "{argument name="magazine headline" default="THE AGE OF INTELLIGENCE IS HERE"}". Painted wall signs read "NEW YORK NO SLEEP. BIG DREAMS." and "THE FUTURE WILL BE BUILT 1996".
translatedPrompt: 一张电影感、照片级的肖像，主角是 {argument name="main subject" default="Sam Altman"}，身处黄昏时分粗犷的屋顶，身穿印有 {argument name="company logo" default="OpenAI"} 标志的黑色飞行员夹克。他的身旁有 4 只穿着超级英雄服装的猫：一只虎斑蜘蛛侠猫、一只黑色蝙蝠侠猫、一只带有发光反应堆的橙色钢铁侠猫，以及一只拿着盾牌的虎斑美国队长猫。背景是 {argument name="city skyline" default="1996 年纽约天际线，包含双子塔"}。一块项目上写着“MISSION: {argument name="whiteboard mission" default="MAKE INTELLIGENCE BENEFIT ALL."}”，并列出了 4 个已勾选的项目：“BETTER MODELS”、“SAFE DEPLOYMENT”、“REAL-WORLD IMPACT” 和 “SAVE SOME TREATS”。前景的木桌上放着一台印有公司标志的 1990 年代复古笔记本电脑、一个写着“BUILD THE FUTURE TOGETHER”的马克杯、一个对讲机，以及一本标题为“{argument name="magazine headline" default="THE AGE OF INTELLIGENCE IS HERE"}”的《WIRED》杂志。墙上的涂鸦写着“NEW YORK NO SLEEP. BIG DREAMS.”和“THE FUTURE WILL BE BUILT 1996”。

breakdown.creativeCore: 复古科技 CEO 与超级英雄猫咪：生成一张电影感肖像，展现一位科技领袖身处 1990 年代怀旧风格的屋顶，周围环绕着超级英雄主题的猫咪，并配有精细的道具。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, retro]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
